nasb.text: But the magicians of Egypt did the same with their secret arts; and Pharaoh’s heart was hardened, and he did not listen to them, as the Lord had said.

esv.text: But the magicians of Egypt did the same by their secret arts. So Pharaoh’s heart remained hardened, and he would not listen to them, as the Lord had said.

cnv.text: 埃及的術士也用他們的巫術這樣行了；可是法老卻心裡剛硬，不肯聽摩西和亞倫，就像耶和華所說的。

ccb.text: 可是，法老的巫师也一样用邪术使水变成血。法老的心仍然刚硬，不肯听从摩西和亚伦的话，正如耶和华所言。
